title: achillea subcartilaginea
intro: Achillea subcartilaginea, also known as a type of yarrow plant, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Achillea subcartilaginea include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. Achillea subcartilaginea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
